_comment: Per-build snapshot of the chip-map data freshness. Updated when sources.md or the underlying datasets are reviewed/refreshed. Surfaced in the page header so the live site stops looking timeless.
label: Data snapshot 2026-06-05
notes: Node + edge counts derived from the bundled CSVs at refresh time. The sources_checked_through date is the latest disclosure date the curator confirmed for the top-20 sources (s1-s20).
